examples: It seems commonly believed that companies are not motivated to prolong their products' lifespan.
In government laboratories and elsewhere, scientists are seeking a drug able to prolong life and youthful vigor.
Extreme high-performance sports may lead to optimal cardiovascular performance, but they quite certainly do not prolong life.
When used in conjunction with chemotherapy, it can prolong the life of patients with breast cancer.
The accession soon afterwards of the first north African country, Morocco, helped to prolong Europe's boom.
